🚀 We're Hiring: Deployment Strategist - Government Defense AI Startup 🚀
Location: San Francisco, California, USA | Salary: $120,000 - $180,000 (USD) | Headcount: 2

Are you passionate about AI and defense technology? Our client, a fast-growing government defense AI startup, is seeking a Deployment Strategist to drive customer success and help scale their enterprise adoption.

This high-impact role is perfect for someone with experience in deployment strategy, customer success, or defense consulting, who’s ready to help transform how companies pursue and win defense contracts using cutting-edge AI tech.

🔑 Key Requirements:
1-6 years of experience in deployment strategy, customer success, or consulting (at a Series A-C company, high-growth B2B SaaS, or defense consulting firm)
Experience in government/defense is a plus – U.S. Senate internship is a strong signal
Georgetown SFS graduates or those with a background in public policy/foreign affairs are ideal

Must be able to manage 50-75 client engagements simultaneously
U.S. citizen (No visa sponsorship)
Ability to travel ~once per month to client engagements
High energy and empathetic communicator with an entrepreneurial mindset

🌟 What You’ll Do:
Lead deployment across a portfolio of defense and space companies
Guide complex product rollouts for companies ranging from startups to Fortune 500s
Drive platform adoption to help customers win government contracts
Lead commercial expansion through upsells and cross-sells
Collaborate with Sales, Product, and Engineering to shape future product features

💼 Ideal Candidate:
Background in defense consulting firms (e.g. Capital Atlas, Beacon Global Strategies, etc.)
Experience with defense startups (e.g. Forterra, Overland AI)
Familiar with government contract portals and workflows
Passionate about AI-driven transformation in defense contracting

🌐 Interested? Reach out directly!
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/+27686393774
Email: Ebrahim@workaholic360.com

💥 This is your chance to be part of something that is revolutionizing defense contracting. Apply today!

#DeploymentStrategist #AI #DefenseTech #GovernmentContracts #B2BSaaS #CustomerSuccess #EntrepreneurialJobs #PublicPolicy #GeorgetownAlumni #WomenInTech #DefenseInnovation

I wrote this to respond to another job seeker who posted about having her time wasted and her patience abused by a recruiter. I thought I’d share it on my wall in case any of the legitimate job posters on LinkedIn  still have souls:
___

As one who has worked as a contractor most of my career & had to hustle for new roles more than most, the current climate is terrible. I was hired by someone who became a dear friend nearly a decade ago, and we worked so well together that she brought me along with her to two more biotechs after the first one we worked with. Last year, she was diagnosed with a fatal disease & passed away. I didn’t even have time to mourn her properly because I had just left our last role in preparation to begin the new one when this happened. 

I quickly hustled up a good, four month contract filling in for a senior project manager who was on leave with a financial firm but since that ended, the search has been hell. Recruiters have always been pretty awful. They have no problem with wasting your time when they have a preferred candidate they want to put in front of a client demanding options. They rarely even let you know what the ultimate outcome of the role ends up being. 

Combine that with the legions of LinkedIn phishing scammers, the companies who are only posting jobs to tout that they’re hiring but have no plans to actually fill them, & then the companies who insist that you interact extensively with their AI before you can ever even speak to a real human so they can train it. They usually have no plans to hire you.  

I’m generally a pretty patient person but I’m also one who believes strongly that bullies & people who abuse others do it because people generally don’t push back, so they think they can get away with it. Glassdoor exists but it’s designed to rate the employment experience, not the recruiting/job seeker experience. As such, I’ve decided that I’ll call out some of the abusers here, since a lot of people hang out on LinkedIn. I’m definitely going to post any companies I encounter who are being used as fronts by scammers because they firewall themselves off from external contact. At this point, many of them know but if they care, they aren’t doing much about it. Stay strong. I’m blessed with a great life. I’d rather have career woes than sick kids or a bad marriage but that doesn’t make this employment climate any less awful

Pakistan risks losing $360m ADB funding for highway project

Pakistan: The country may lose a $360 million loan from the Asian Development Bank (ADB) for the CAREC Tranche III highway project if a final decision is not made before the April 5 deadline. Officials stated that ADB has already granted a one-month extension and warned that failure to award the contract could lead to non-compliance and cancellation of funding. The project includes key road links connecting Rajanpur, Jampur, D.G. Khan, Tibbi Qaisrani and DI Khan, with a total value of Rs172 billion. Experts believe that
 delays could impact regional connectivity and economic growth, especially amid rising financial pressures due to increasing global oil costs.

📅 Duration: ~3 months (extendable)
🔥 This is where real ML engineering meets cutting-edge AI
You’ll be:
✔️ Building end-to-end ML pipelines (data → model → deployment)
✔️ Working with real datasets & production-grade systems
✔️ Optimizing models for performance, scalability & accuracy
✔️ Collaborating with product & engineering teams
✔️ Applying latest ML techniques to real-world problems

4+ years in Machine Learning / Data Science

🚀 Real talk:
If you’re already working on ML and want to step into high-impact AI systems, this is a strong move.
👉 Apply here: [https://lnkd.in/efYANfZ2]

Interview Process:
The vetting process involves a technical interview conducted by a human; you will not be allowed to use an AI IDE (Integrated Development Environment) but you will be allowed to use LLMs or Stack Overflow

Here are more details about the role:
You must be able to commit around 20 hours per week for this role
This contract is expected to last at least 1 month
Successful contributions increase the odds that you are selected on future projects with Mercor
The vetting process involves a 90 minute human interview centered on Python - you will hear back within two weeks
With respect to pay and legal status:
This role will pay $100/h based on experience

📢 HIRING - Official Announcement: R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd

MISSION: BUILDING INDIA’S BLUE ECONOMY 2026

R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd (Founder: Thangavel Ramesh, IIT Madras), ஒரு ஆழமான கடல்சார் தொழில்நுட்ப நிறுவனம் (Deep-Tech Marine Infrastructure Company), இந்தியாவின் கடல் வளத்தைப் பாதுகாக்கப் புதிய மைல்கல்லை எட்டுகிறது.

The Vision:
In line with the Union Budget 2026 and India’s vision for a $10 Trillion Economy, we are scaling our operations to handle:

₹1000 Crore in Marine EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) Execution.

₹100 Crore in High-Level Strategic Marine & Offshore Consultancy.

Seeking National Builders (MEN – Job Creation)
நாட்டை மேம்படுத்தும் இந்த மாபெரும் பணியில் இணைய வல்லுநர்களை அழைக்கிறோம்:

Tier 1 Experts: Deep-Tech Experts, Marine Structural Engineers (IIT/NIT Background), and AI-Robotics Architects.

Execution Force: Project Managers, Site Engineers, and Quality Control Officers for massive coastal projects.

Skilled Technicians: Marine-certified Welders, Fabricators, and Certified Commercial Divers.

Our Goal: To create 500+ direct jobs and empower the next generation of Marine Engineering talent in India. 🇮🇳

Partnering for Progress (MACHINE & MATERIAL)
R&S Engineering is earmarking resources for immediate and long-term projects:

MACHINERY: We invite vendors for Jack-up Barges, Tug Boats, AHTS Vessels, and Heavy Piling Rigs on a long-term lease/contract basis.

MATERIALS: Seeking strategic partners for Marine-grade Steel (API X65/X70), High-density Composites, and AI-integrated Sensors for Structural Health Monitoring.

Why Join R&S Engineering?
We are not just a company; we are a "Vignana-Siddhar" led movement.
Purely financial-focused தலைமை செய்யும் நிறுவனங்கள் விட்டுச்சென்ற 70% இடைவெளியை, எங்களின் "Engineering Integrity" மற்றும் 13 Patents மூலம் நிரப்பப்போகிறோம்.

How to Apply / Register Interest:
Interested Candidates & Strategic Partners, please send your Letter of Intent (LOI) and Updated Resumes to:

📧 careers.rameshandsowmiyaengg@gmail.com
📍 Headquarters: R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd, Nathakkattur, Erumaipatti Post, Edappadi TK, Salem 637102, Tamilnadu, India

Mission:
R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd is officially registered in Salem, TN, with a vision to revolutionize India's Blue Economy. As a Research Scholar at IIT Madras, I am bridging the gap between Scientific Research and Deep-Tech Infrastructure.

innovation:
R&S Engineering Pvt Ltd > Innovation fueled by IIT Madras Research Excellence

🚀 Hiring: Software Expert – CAD & Engineering
🌍 Remote | 💼 Contract | 💰 Up to $100/hour
Now this is for real engineers… not theory, not slides — actual hands-on CAD work 👀
If you’ve worked with professional design tools and understand engineering workflows deeply, this is a strong one.
🧠 What you’ll be doing:
• Record real CAD workflows with step-by-step explanations
• Annotate software interfaces (UI elements, engineering tools, flows)
• Demonstrate how experts actually use tools in real scenarios
• Follow structured tasks to produce high-quality datasets for AI systems
🛠 Tools you should know:
AutoCAD Mechanical | SolidWorks | Inventor | Vivado
💡 What they’re looking for:
• Strong hands-on experience in CAD / mechanical / engineering design
• Detail-oriented with ability to follow precise instructions
• Comfortable working independently
• Able to document and explain workflows clearly
⚠️ Requirements:
• Must have access to a physical Mac
• Fluent in English
• Independent contractor setup
💡 Why this role stands out:
• High hourly rate
• Flexible schedule (you control your time)
• Work on real engineering workflows used to train AI systems
📍 Location: Fully Remote (Global)
💸 Weekly payments via Stripe / Wise
❌ No visa sponsorship (H1-B / STEM OPT not supported)
If you’re a CAD or engineering expert — this is a smart way to monetize your real-world experience.
Apply here: [https://t.mercor.com/YSq0N]
